channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Raiders' Owen Pattie's impressive NRL performance highlights key stats
item.description: Owen Pattie, a rising star for the Canberra Raiders, has emerged as one of the NRL's most lethal players thanks to his exceptional kicking accuracy. In just 35 games, Pattie has booted five tries, pla...

item.title: PM Shehbaz Pushes for Full Digitization of Remittances and Cashless Economy
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has directed the full digitization of remittances from abroad as part of Pakistan's transition to a cashless and digital economy. During a meeting in Islamabad, the PM em...

item.title: Last Polio Survivor Dies at 78 as Iron Lung Machine Becomes Unrepairable
item.description: The article details the death of an 78-year-old woman who was the last surviving polio patient reliant on an iron lung machine. Her passing occurred after the outdated ventilator, a critical piece of ...

item.title: South Africa's 'Cat' Withdraws from Plea Deal, Trial Proceeds
item.description: Vusimuzi 'Cat' Matlala, an alleged organised crime member, has formally withdrawn from his plea deal with the state, leading to the nullification of the agreement. The magistrate, Ignatius du Preez, r...

item.title: Education Stakeholders Urge Safer Schools to Combat Violence and Enhance Learning
item.description: Education stakeholders in Tanzania have emphasized the need for stronger measures to eliminate violence in schools, highlighting that safe environments are crucial for improving academic performance a...

item.title: Senate Proceeds with Impeachment Trial of VP Sara Duterte
item.description: The Senate impeachment court resumed the trial of Vice President Sara Duterte on July 14, 2026, with the defense team continuing to cross-examine National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) official Jeremy...

item.title: Loved Ones Rally Outside Supreme Court as Legal Battle Over Isla Bell Case Continues
item.description: The loved ones and supporters of Isla Bell have gathered outside the Supreme Court to show solidarity as the man accused of dumping her body faces attempts to dismiss his case. This rally underscores ...

item.title: Former KDF Major Convicted of Murdering Wife and Children
item.description: A former Kenya Defence Forces (KDF) major, Peter Mugure Mwaura, has been sentenced to life imprisonment for the murders of his wife, Joyce Syombua, and their two children at Nanyuki Airbase. The rulin...

item.title: Benin's Response to Sahel Refugee Crisis
item.description: Tens of thousands of people fleeing violence in Burkina Faso, Niger, and Nigeria have arrived in northern Benin, creating a humanitarian crisis that strains the community-based reception model in Coto...

item.title: Dustin Poirier comments on Conor McGregor's UFC 329 injury
item.description: Dustin Poirier has described Conor McGregor's injury during UFC 329 as 'karma,' following the Irish fighter's first-round loss to Max Holloway. McGregor, who had not competed in five years, suffered a...

item.title: Inquest questions official report on 2023 SeaWorld helicopter crash
item.description: An official inquiry has cast doubt on the findings of a report regarding the fatal 2023 Sea World helicopter accident, with an inquest revealing significant concerns about the investigation's thorough...

item.title: Nickelback Releases New Album 'Everything Under the Sun'
item.description: Canadian rock band Nickelback has officially launched their highly anticipated new album titled 'Everything Under the Sun,' marking their return to the music scene after a period of relative silence. ...

item.title: Discrepancies in Credit Ratings of African Institutions Highlight Need for Objectivity
item.description: The article discusses how Western credit rating agencies like Moody’s, S&P Global, and Fitch often provide conflicting assessments of African institutions and countries. These divergences suggest pote...

item.title: Left-wing activist's controversial remarks on Ann Widdecombe's death spark backlash
item.description: A left-wing activist sparked significant controversy by suggesting that many people would not grieve the death of Ann Widdecombe, a prominent political figure, during a BBC Politics Live segment. Daze...

item.title: Nursing Student Overcomes Financial Barriers to Graduate as Registered Nurse, Midwife
item.description: Godirilwe Pearl Mabusela, a Kenyan nursing student, overcame significant financial challenges to eventually graduate as a Registered Nurse and Midwife. Forced to leave her studies in 2014 when her fam...

item.title: Oil Prices Rise Amid US-Iran Tensions as Tech Stocks Downturn
item.description: The article discusses how oil prices surged over 9% after fresh US strikes against Iran escalated tensions in the Middle East. The attacks on Iranian sites following a commercial ship strike in the St...

item.title: Edmonton apartment building fire causes significant damage
item.description: A fire broke out in a north Edmonton apartment building on July 14, 2026, prompting emergency responders to combat the blaze. The incident, which occurred in the early morning hours, resulted in struc...

item.title: Ike Barinholtz Jokes About Mitch McConnell's Photo During 'Jimmy Kimmel Live' Appearance
item.description: During a recent episode of 'Jimmy Kimmel Live,' guest host Ike Barinholtz made a pointed remark about a new photo of Senator Mitch McConnell, who had been hospitalized for nearly a month. Barinholtz q...

item.title: Tamil Nadu CM launches development projects and inaugurates MLA office in Perambur
item.description: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister C. Joseph Vijay inaugurated his MLA office in Perambur constituency on July 13, 2026, marking his first official visit to the area since winning the 2026 Assembly election. T...

item.title: Court Sentences Bandit’s Ally to 20 Years in Prison
item.description: The Federal High Court in Abuja has sentenced Muhammad Sani, an associate of notorious bandit Danranmi, to 20 years in prison for concealing information that could have led to Danranmi's arrest. Judge...
